content.en:
"How can this be, 11 lord-level forbidden zergs!"

Migu Dao Ancestor was very panicked, his strength was not as good as the Eternal Dao Ancestor, the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, and even less than the half-step domain ancestor like the Qinglong Palace Lord, it would be good to be able to compete with a lord-level forbidden Zerg.

But now, the three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg came to deal with him, and the two-headed forbidden zerg hidden was still very strong, and their strength was above him.

Whew!!

The three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg began to besiege the Migu Dao Ancestor and completely crushed the Migu Dao Ancestor.

In a short time, Migu Daozu was injured, and even the forbidden weapon-grade defensive armor on his body began to crack.

Once he was without the forbidden weapon-grade protective armor, his situation fell into an extremely difficult level.

Abrupt.

One of the lord-level forbidden zergs directly pierced the head of the Migu Dao Ancestor, although the head of the Migu Dao Ancestor healed, but the blow just now penetrated deep into his soul sea, and even hurt his soul, making him have a headache.

Click!!

The rift in the forbidden weapon's armor is getting bigger and bigger, and now it can still neutralize some of the attacks, but as time passes, the ability to offset becomes weaker and weaker.

Migu Daozu was seriously injured at the moment, his combat strength was greatly reduced, and his condition was very critical.

"Qinglong Palace Lord, Eternal Dao Ancestor, I can't stop it! If you don't send the half-step domain ancestor hidden by your forces to come over, I will just flee!"

Migu Dao ancestor said.

He couldn't defeat the three-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, but there was still hope of escaping.

Of course, if it weren't for the desperate situation, he wouldn't have deliberately fled, otherwise if he fled, the Dao Ancestors of the Mitian Sect would be finished, and the battle line of the Dao Mountain Realm would definitely collapse.

Even if the Forbidden Zerg can't enter the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the consequences are very serious.

But he can't control so much then, after all, he doesn't want to die.

Distance.

The faces of the Qinglong Palace Lord and the Eternal Dao Ancestor changed, and they wanted to support the Migu Dao Ancestor, but they had no choice, they were also entangled, and there was no way to get out.

Besides, eight against eleven is indeed in a weak position.

"Migu Daozu, hold on a little longer!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor also sent a message to ask the Migu Dao Ancestor to hold on for a little longer, and the meaning was already very clear.

"Okay, I'll hold on a little longer!"

Migu Daozu agreed.

He was indeed seriously injured, but there were also a lot of life-saving things, so it was no problem to hold on a little longer.

But once he really felt that he couldn't bear it anymore, or the support from the Heavenly Emperor Palace and Black Wind Mountain was delayed, then sorry, he wouldn't hold on any longer.

Time passed little by little, and the advantage of the battle situation was tilted towards the side of the Forbidden Zerg, and many Dao Ancestors died in battle, although there were many Forbidden Zerg who died in battle, but the Taboo Zerg developed rapidly, and the speed at which Dao Ancestors were born was very slow.

Therefore, exchanging the life of a Dao Ancestor for the life of a forbidden zerg of the same rank is not cost-effective at all.

Abrupt.

The void shook in the distance, and a figure slowly walked over, attracting the attention of many Dao Ancestors.

Seeing this person, many Dao Ancestors were overjoyed, because this was the existence of a half-step domain ancestor, and he was wearing the battle clothes and armor of Black Wind Mountain.

"Gengjin Daozu, go and help Migu Daozu!"

Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke.

"Okay!"

Gengjin Daozu nodded, turned into a golden light and tore through the dark forbidden void, descended on Migu Daozu's side, wrapped up a lord-level forbidden zerg for Migu Daozu, and went to fight in another area.

"I ......"

Migu Daozu wanted to scold people very much, he was seriously injured, why didn't Gengjin Daozu take away the two lord-level forbidden zergs!

Only took away one lord-level forbidden zerg, and there were still two lord-level forbidden zergs left, and he still couldn't bear it!

However, he could also see that this new half-step domain ancestor was also in the middle of him and him, at most a little stronger than him, and he couldn't beat the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, even if he wrapped the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg, after a long time, he would definitely be injured, and he would not be able to withstand it.

The other party is here to support, not to find death.

If it were him, he would definitely not face the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg alone.

Now, he could only wait for the arrival of the half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

It didn't take long for the half-step domain ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace to arrive!

Recite!!!

With a chirp, an ancient Chaos Vermilion Bird descended, and its huge wings spread out like a chaotic universe, instantly tearing apart the forbidden void, only to see a wing light slash in, instantly killing a large number of forbidden zergs.

The strength of this Ancient Chaos Vermilion Bird far surpassed that of the Invincible Dao Ancestor, and it was also a half-step Domain Ancestor.

"Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, don't show off, quickly turn into a human battle, your form is not suitable for fighting with the lord-level forbidden zerg!" said the Lord of the Blue Dragon Palace.

Wow!

The primeval Chaos Vermilion Bird turned into a person, a young man with a demonic face, that is, the Vermilion Bird Palace Master of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

"Vermilion Bird Palace Master, didn't he die in battle?"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor was shocked.

The domain realm was shattered in a battle, and the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord was killed in battle, this is something that everyone knows.

There were only three palace masters left in the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the other palace masters died in battle, and the Vermilion Bird Palace Master was one of them.

But I never expected that the Vermilion Bird Palace Master was not dead.

"Cunning Heavenly Emperor Palace!"

A half-step domain ancestor said secretly in his heart.

After the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord turned into a human body, he also took away a lord-level forbidden zerg, and only gave the weakest lord-level forbidden zerg to the Migu Dao Ancestor, so that the Migu Dao Ancestor would be enough to compete with the lord-level forbidden zerg and not be killed.

Ten against eleven, the battle at the half-step domain ancestor level was almost in a state of balance.

After fighting for a while, the Qinglong Palace Lord and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor said, "Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, your spatial forbidden Dao is very strong, and your speed is faster than mine. You transfer that lord-level forbidden zerg of yours to me, I will stop you for a while, you go to support the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, and cooperate with the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord to kill a lord-level forbidden zerg!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor frowned: "Qinglong Palace Master, if I cooperate with the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, I can't kill a lord-level forbidden zerg, the lord-level forbidden Zerg has a very strong life-saving ability, and it is not so easy to kill!"

"Our Heavenly Emperor Palace has brought a Heavenly Emperor Weapon this time, which is enough to suppress a lord-level forbidden zerg!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord said.

"Heavenly Emperor Weapon, your Heavenly Emperor Palace is really willing, it seems that you want to kill a lord-level forbidden zerg and use it for research! Yes, the corpse of the lord-level forbidden zerg is of high value, and its core origin contains a higher level of taboo dao, and the value is not known how many times higher than that of the commander-level taboo zerg, when you are in the Divine Heaven Realm, it is almost a dream to get a half-step domain ancestor-level forbidden zerg, no wonder you are moved!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

"If you want to make a move, you decide for yourself, if you don't want to, then I'm sorry, I will first abandon the two-headed lord-level forbidden zerg that fought with me, and go directly to help Vermilion Bird Dao Ancestor!"

The Blue Dragon Palace Lord directly threatened.

"You're ruthless, I promised!"

Shenxu Dao Ancestor agreed.
